title: Boundary-Aware Context Grounding for A Low-Channel EEG Agent
innovation_summary: Boundary-Aware Context Grounding for A Low-Channel EEG Agent: We present NeuraDock Agent, an open-source architecture that separates a deterministic local EEG engine from a hardware-aware language layer.
